---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.section-title}
## Contact

:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### University
Newcastle Business School  
The University of Newcastle  
Australia

**Email:** mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au
:::
::: {.card}
### Profiles
[University profile](https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie)  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/DrGenie)  
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216)
:::
:::
